markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content performance, webinar follow-up, and project bandwidth.](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Dip:** A 12% performance dip was caused by a workflow change that generated off-brand content. The issue is resolved, and 17 corrected articles will publish by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [**Webinar Success:** A recent webinar drew 30+ live attendees and generated 20+ technical content ideas, confirming the strategy is attracting the right persona.](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [**Strategic Messaging:** Content must differentiate Imubit's non-linear AI models from "traditional" physics-based models and frame the platform as enabling "engineering empowerment."](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [**Project Bandwidth:** GrowthX lacks bandwidth for the "deeper dive" content pieces requested last week, requiring Imubit to find an alternative solution.](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Correction

  - [**Problem:** A recent 12% performance dip was traced to a new internal workflow generating content that violated brand guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [**Solution:** The workflow was adjusted, and 17 corrected articles are now ready for publication by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)

### Webinar Follow-up & Content Strategy

  - [**Webinar Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
      - [**Registrants:** 87](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
      - [**Live Attendees:** 30+](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
      - [**Significance:** The highly technical Q\&A confirms the event attracted the target persona.](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
      - [**Goal:** Convert webinar insights into 20+ new articles, starting with a blog post based on attendee questions.](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
      - [**Messaging Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
          - [**Problem:** "Traditional modeling" (physics-based, linear relationships) is insufficient for complex industrial processes.](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
          - [**Solution:** Imubit's platform uses non-linear AI models to solve these problems.](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
          - [**Benefit:** "Engineering empowerment" → enables engineers and operators to build models, reducing reliance on data science teams.](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [**Content Ideas:**](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
      - [Model building (traditional vs. AI)](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
      - [Engineering empowerment](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
      - [Data readiness (new angles for existing articles)](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [Physics and AI (first principles models)](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
      - [Non-linearity](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)

### Project Bandwidth

  - [**Request:** Imubit asked GrowthX about bandwidth for the "deeper dive" content pieces discussed last week.](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [**Outcome:** GrowthX confirmed they do not have the capacity for these projects at this time.](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
      - [Publish the 17 corrected articles by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
      - [Conduct keyword research on webinar insights to develop new article topics.](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [**Imubit:**](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
      - [Share the finalized webinar blog post with GrowthX upon completion.](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
      - [Find an alternative solution for the "deeper dive" content pieces.](https://fathom.video/share/ypuV8NxoRgtxCyxcpSSWZdzjjJTd79Uq?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
